articles.title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
articles.summary: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.

articles.title: Dubai crypto market hits 50 licensed firms after new VARA approval

articles.summary: The funding round is Venice AI’s first external capital raise since it launched in May 2024.

articles.title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
articles.summary: Crypto ATMs are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.
